news: Securities fraud class action lawsuit filed against Soleno alleging company systematically downplayed safety concerns related to excess fluid retention in DCCR clinical trials.

changes.reason: Fraud lawsuit alleging downplayed fluid retention safety concerns increases risk of prescriber caution and higher discontinuation rates
Safety-related lawsuit creates overhang on commercial penetration as prescribers may become more cautious
Safety allegations could negatively impact EMA review process for EU approval
Lawsuit regarding safety concerns may create regulatory headwinds for EU approval
